scripts.dev: npm run build -w @multiplayer-blueprint/shared && concurrently -k -n server,client -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @multiplayer-blueprint/server" "npm run dev -w @multiplayer-blueprint/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @multiplayer-blueprint/shared && npm run build -w @multiplayer-blueprint/client && npm run build -w @multiplayer-blueprint/server
scripts.test: npm run build -w @multiplayer-blueprint/shared && npm run test -w @multiplayer-blueprint/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @multiplayer-blueprint/shared && npm run typecheck -w @multiplayer-blueprint/client && npm run typecheck -w @multiplayer-blueprint/server
